summary: Safe Zone Detection Engine (Phase 33) testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all components rendering correctly: zone stats, map with heatmap, legend, click-to-check interaction, alert card with score breakdown, current conditions panel.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/safety/zone-map returns all risk zones (18 zones: 10 CRITICAL, 8 HIGH) with stats, time_multiplier, time_period
POST /api/safety/check-zone returns correct risk_level, risk_score, score_breakdown, recommendation, zone_id
Time-of-day multipliers verified: Day=1.0 (6-19), Night=1.3 (20-23), Late Night=1.6 (0-5)
Zone transition tracking works: new_entry alert for first check, same_zone no-alert for repeat, escalation alert for SAFE→HIGH
Score breakdown includes all components: crime_density (50%), recent_incidents (30%), time_of_day (10%), environment (10%)
Caching works: second check for same zone returns cached=true
Frontend SafeZoneDashboard renders all required elements with proper data-testid attributes
Risk colors correctly applied: SAFE=green (#22c55e), LOW=yellow (#eab308), HIGH=orange (#f97316), CRITICAL=red (#dc2626)
Recommendations verified: SAFE=continue_journey, LOW=stay_alert, HIGH=alternative_route, CRITICAL=leave_immediately
Zone map overlay shows total zones (18) and critical count (10)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing location_risk_zones data (18 zones)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safe Zone Detection Engine fully functional. API endpoints at /api/safety/zone-map and /api/safety/check-zone. Frontend dashboard at /operator/safe-zones. Data-testids: safe-zone-dashboard, safe-zone-stats, safe-zone-map, safe-zone-legend, safe-zone-refresh, safe-zone-alert. Zone engine uses in-memory cache (MOCKED Redis) with 5min TTL. OSRM uses public server for routing.

mocked_apis.OSRM: Uses public OSRM server for routing

backend_api_tests: GET /api/safety/zone-map returns 200
Zone map has required fields (zones, total_zones, time_multiplier, time_period, stats, generated_at)
Stats includes CRITICAL, HIGH, LOW, SAFE counts
Zone objects have all fields (zone_id, zone_name, lat, lng, radius_m, risk_score, base_risk_score, risk_level, incident_count)
Time multiplier is correct for day hours (1.0 for 6-19)
Zone map requires authentication (401/403 without auth)
POST /api/safety/check-zone returns 200
Check zone response has all required fields
Score breakdown includes crime_density, recent_incidents, time_of_day, environment
Critical zone coords return HIGH/CRITICAL risk level
Safe area coords return SAFE/LOW risk level
Safe zone returns continue_journey recommendation
High risk zone returns alternative_route recommendation
New user first check returns new_entry transition
Same zone repeat check returns same_zone, no alert
Escalation (SAFE→HIGH) triggers alert
Caching works (second check returns cached=true)
Check zone requires authentication
Day timestamp (10:00) returns multiplier 1.0
Night timestamp (22:00) returns multiplier 1.3
Late night timestamp (03:00) returns multiplier 1.6
Risk level classification verified against thresholds
Guardian can access zone-map
Guardian can check-zone
frontend_ui_tests: Stats show Critical, High, Low, Safe counts
Leaflet map with CartoDB dark tiles
Legend renders (data-testid=safe-zone-legend) with CRITICAL, HIGH, LOW, SAFE
Current Conditions panel shows Time Period, Time Multiplier, Active Zones
Map click triggers zone check API
Alert card appears after map click (data-testid=safe-zone-alert)
Score breakdown in alert card (Crime Density, Incidents, Time of Day, Environment)
Risk colors correct: green, yellow, orange, red
Zone overlay shows zone count and critical count

verified_features: GET /api/safety/zone-map returns all risk zones with stats, time_multiplier, time_period
POST /api/safety/check-zone returns risk_level, score, breakdown, recommendation, zone_id
Time-of-day multipliers: Day=1.0 (6-19), Night=1.3 (20-23), Late Night=1.6 (0-5)
Zone transition tracking: new_entry → same_zone → escalation/de_escalation
Score breakdown: crime_density, recent_incidents, time_of_day, environment
Risk colors: SAFE=green, LOW=yellow, HIGH=orange, CRITICAL=red
Zone map overlay with zone count and critical count
